/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libtest_package_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so -o libtest_package_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so CMakeFiles/test_package_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/test_package_msgs/msg/detail/aruco_marker__type_support_c.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib:/home/minibot/test_files_ros/build/test_package_msgs: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so libtest_package_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libfastcdr.so.1.0.24 /opt/ros/humble/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
